case_title: JOSHUA EVERT KEMPENAAR VS. YIYU LIU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KEMPENAAR, JOSHUA EVERT AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU AS TO PLAINTIFF KEMPENAAR, JOSHUA EVERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA EVERT KEMPENAAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YIYU LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $198.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JOSEPH HITTINGER, 1902 VAN NESS AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED FEB-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO YIYU LIU (AKA DANIEL LIU) 1902 VAN NESS AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109
ORDER OEX HEARING OFF CALENDAR: NO APPEARANCES
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-20-2019 - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEMPENAAR, JOSHUA EVERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.00, DEFENDANT YIYU LIU AKA DANIEL LIU SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF JOSHUA EVERT KEMPENAAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YIYU ALSO KNOWN AS DANIEL LIU
